message:
🐛 Fix Copilot PR-to-issue linking regex and update labels (#131)

* Fix Copilot PR-to-issue linking regex and update labels on PR open

Copilot uses the `Fixes owner/repo#NNN` format when referencing issues
in PR bodies, but the regex only matched `Fixes #NNN`. Update the regex
to optionally match the `owner/repo` prefix.

Also update issue labels when a Copilot PR is opened: add `ai-pr-active`
and remove `ai-processing` and `ai-queued` to reflect the new state.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>

* fix: address Copilot review comments on PR-to-issue linking

- Tighten author check to exact copilot-swe-agent[bot] identity + Bot type
- Reject PRs from forks to prevent untrusted write actions
- Capture owner/repo from regex and skip cross-repo issue references
- Wrap comment in try/catch so label updates run even if comment fails
- Handle add/remove label operations independently

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
